2604.08541.title: Seeing but Not Thinking: Routing Distraction in Multimodal Mixture-of-Experts
2604.08541.paper_summary: Multimodal Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) models have achieved remarkable performance on vision-language tasks. However, we identify a puzzling phenomenon termed Seeing but Not Thinking: models accurately perceive image content yet fail in subsequent reasoning, while correctly solving identical problems presented as pure text. Through systematic analysis, we first verify that cross-modal semantic sharing exists in MoE architectures, ruling out semantic alignment failure as the sole explanation. We then reveal that visual experts and domain experts exhibit layer-wise separation, with image inputs inducing significant routing divergence from text inputs in middle layers where domain experts concentrate. Based on these findings, we propose the Routing Distraction hypothesis: when processing visual inputs, the routing mechanism fails to adequately activate task-relevant reasoning experts. To validate this hypothesis, we design a routing-guided intervention method that enhances domain expert activation. Experiments on three multimodal MoE models across six benchmarks demonstrate consistent improvements, with gains of up to 3.17% on complex visual reasoning tasks. Our analysis further reveals that domain expert identification locates cognitive functions rather than sample-specific solutions, enabling effective transfer across tasks with different information structures.
2604.08541.paper_summary_zh: 多模態專家混合模型（MoE）在視覺語言任務上取得了顯著的表現。<lb/>然而，我們識別出一個令人困惑的現象，稱為「看見但不思考」：模型能準確感知圖像內容，但在隨後的推理中失敗，而在以純文本呈現的相同問題上卻能正確解決。<lb/>通過系統分析，我們首先驗證了MoE架構中存在跨模態語義共享，排除了語義對齊失敗作為唯一解釋的可能性。<lb/>接著，我們揭示了視覺專家和領域專家在層級上存在分離，圖像輸入在中間層中引起了與文本輸入顯著的路由差異，而這些中間層是領域專家的集中區域。<lb/>基於這些發現，我們提出了路由干擾假設：在處理視覺輸入時，路由機制未能充分激活與任務相關的推理專家。<lb/>為了驗證這一假設，我們設計了一種路由引導的干預方法，以增強領域專家的激活。<lb/>在六個基準上的三個多模態MoE模型的實驗顯示了一致的改進，在複雜的視覺推理任務中提高了最多3.17%的表現。<lb/>我們的分析進一步揭示，領域專家的識別定位的是認知功能，而非樣本特定的解決方案，使得在不同信息結構的任務之間能有效轉移。
2604.08541.author: Haolei Xu et.al.
2604.08541.authors: Haolei Xu, Haiwen Hong, Hongxing Li, Rui Zhou, Yang Zhang, Longtao Huang, Hui Xue, Yongliang Shen, Weiming Lu, Yueting Zhuang
